case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. APRIL FERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
